Lastly, she is probably better as either bleed spam or exalt spam rather than the strike kinda stuff

Pandia
With caecus SSR wheel

With the wheel that dispel enemies buff
So you guarantee a nuke with lily's strike
You can also go celeste
If they kill lily
You revive her at 1 hp
Then you buff her with wheels + other
Then you discard your hand
With the posse that full discard so you force draw her cards
Then you nuke
here's what I had

yeah, not sure what to replace them with

A really toxic way to counter helo team and replace that void posse would be this
Your strat is to make lily dmg them and blighten them then aurita finish them up right?

You want aurita to have exalt ready
Otherwise it brick

And if they run analysis of death you're kinda screwed
Replace void wheel with entwine
Or the healing posse
My guess would be something like entwine + reshuffle hand posse
Maybe doll can function but it will put lily 30 hp so it's not optional for one shot
But you have cleanse at the very least
Why wouldnt it be optimal? Lily doesnt care about how low she is, just how much damage has been recorded on her
Unless im missing something
Her 4 cost dmg scale based of missing health
If she dies, doll revive her at 30 hp
Unlike celeste who revive at 1 hp
Huh, it says hp lost rather than missing hp, which implied to me it scaled off total damage taken, not missing hp
Must have misinterpreted
It's missing health
Well...
Kinda same thing anyway
You can also try it in trial if you want
You take revive posse
You kill her then revive her at 15 hp
The dmg from 4 cost would increase regardless
Yeah, you're right. Good to know, I misinterpreted it then
Just weird that gHelot says 'Hp missing' whereas Lily says 'hp lost'
They use ChatGPT
